comment: Download sources tried in order during install. The first source that responds within the connect timeout wins; on failure the installer automatically falls back to the next. No user action required. install.sh hard-codes the same list (keep in sync); postinstall.js reads this file. The skillvm.ai mirror must expose: <releases>/<owner>/<repo>/releases/download/<tag>/<asset> and <api>/repos/<owner>/<repo>/releases/latest (static JSON with at least tag_name).
